Description: Add @nuxt/ui module with correct configuration
Do: Use the official @nuxt/ui module

Description: Nuxt UI includes Tailwind CSS - avoid duplicate config
Do: Let Nuxt UI manage Tailwind configuration
Code Good:
// Nuxt UI handles Tailwind
// No extra config needed

Description: Configure primary and gray colors in app.config.ts
Do: Define colors in app.config.ts

Description: UButton provides consistent styling and loading states
Do: Use UButton with appropriate variants

Description: Use semantic variants for different actions
Do: Match variant to action importance
Don't: Use same variant for all buttons
Code Good:
<UButton variant="solid" label="Primary" />
<UButton variant="outline" label="Secondary" />
<UButton variant="ghost" label="Tertiary" />
<UButton variant="link" label="Link" />
Code Bad:
<UButton label="Save" />
<UButton label="Cancel" />
<UButton label="Delete" />
// All look the same

Description: UInput provides validation integration and consistent styling
Do: Use UInput with proper type and validation

Description: UCard provides consistent card styling with header body and footer
Do: Use UCard slots for structured content

Description: Nuxt UI integrates with Iconify for thousands of icons
Do: Use icon prop with Iconify format

Description: Add required icon collections in nuxt.config
Do: Install and configure icon collections needed

Description: Handle dynamic icon names with UIcon component
Do: Use UIcon for dynamic icon rendering

Description: Override default props for consistent styling
Do: Configure defaults in app.config.ts ui section
Don't: Override props on every component instance
Code Bad:
<UButton size="lg" color="primary">
<UButton size="lg" color="primary">
// Repeated on every button

Description: Leverage Nuxt UI design tokens for spacing colors and typography
Do: Use Tailwind classes that map to UI tokens
Don't: Hardcode pixel values and hex colors

Description: Add custom variants or modify existing styles
Do: Use ui prop for component-level customization
Code Good:
<UButton
  :ui="{
    rounded: 'rounded-full',
    padding: { sm: 'px-6 py-3' }
  }"
>
  Custom Button
</UButton>

Description: UForm integrates with validation libraries seamlessly
Do: Wrap forms in UForm with schema validation

Description: Use Zod schemas for type-safe validation
Do: Define Zod schema and pass to UForm

Description: UFormGroup provides label error display and description
Do: Wrap each field in UFormGroup
Code Good:
<UFormGroup
  label="Username"
  name="username"
  description="Choose a unique username"
  required
>
  <UInput v-model="state.username" />
</UFormGroup>

Description: Manage loading and success states during form submission
Do: Use loading prop and disable during submission
Code Bad:
<UButton type="submit" @click="submit">
  Submit
  <!-- Can be clicked multiple times -->
</UButton>

Description: USelect provides searchable accessible dropdowns
Do: Use USelect with options array

Description: UModal provides accessible modal dialogs with transitions
Do: Use UModal with v-model for visibility

Description: USlideover provides slide-in panels from screen edges
Do: Use USlideover for secondary content panels
Don't: Use modals for all overlay content
Code Bad:
<UModal v-model="showFilters">
  <!-- Modal for filters - poor UX -->
</UModal>

Description: UPopover shows content anchored to a trigger element
Do: Use UPopover for tooltips and contextual menus

Description: Ensure overlays are keyboard accessible and announce properly
Do: Use built-in a11y features and add aria labels
Don't: Ignore keyboard and screen reader support
Code Good:
<UModal
  v-model="isOpen"
  :ui="{ overlay: { background: 'bg-gray-900/75' } }"
>
  <!-- Focus trap and aria handled -->
</UModal>

Description: UDashboardLayout provides complete dashboard structure
Do: Use dashboard components for admin interfaces

Description: Support sidebar collapse for more content space
Do: Use collapsible prop and persist state

Description: UDashboardCard displays metrics with icons and trends
Do: Use UDashboardCard for KPI displays

Description: UTable provides sortable filterable data tables
Do: Use UTable with columns and rows configuration

Description: Configure columns with key label and sortable properties
Do: Define typed column configuration

Description: Enable row selection for bulk actions
Do: Use v-model:selected for selection state
Code Bad: // Manual checkbox handling

Guideline: Add table empty and loading states
Description: Handle empty data and loading states gracefully
Do: Use empty-state and loading props
Code Bad:
<UTable :rows="users" />
<!-- Shows empty table when no data -->

Description: UNavigationMenu provides accessible navigation structure
Do: Use navigation components for menus

Description: UBreadcrumb shows current location in hierarchy
Do: Use UBreadcrumb with proper links array
Code Good:
<UBreadcrumb :links="[
  { label: 'Home', to: '/' },
  { label: 'Products', to: '/products' },
  { label: product.name }
]" />

Description: UTabs provides accessible tabbed interface
Do: Use UTabs with items configuration
Code Good:
<UTabs :items="tabs">
  <template #item="{ item }">
    <UCard>{{ item.content }}</UCard>
  </template>
</UTabs>
const tabs = [
  { label: 'Overview', content: '...' },
  { label: 'Settings', content: '...' }
]

Description: UPagination provides page navigation with proper a11y
Do: Use UPagination with total and modelValue

Description: useToast provides non-blocking notifications
Do: Use useToast composable for feedback

Description: Set toast position based on UI context
Do: Configure toast position in app.config
Don't: Let toasts appear in default position only
Code Bad:
// Toasts always bottom-right
// May conflict with FABs

Description: UAlert displays contextual feedback inline
Do: Use UAlert for form errors and info messages
Code Good:
<UAlert
  title="Error"
  description="Please fix the errors below"
  color="red"
  icon="i-heroicons-exclamation-triangle"
/>

Description: USkeleton provides content placeholders during loading
Do: Use USkeleton matching content shape
Don't: Show spinners for all loading states
Code Good:
<template v-if="loading">
  <USkeleton class="h-4 w-3/4" />
  <USkeleton class="h-4 w-1/2" />
  <USkeleton class="h-32 w-full" />
</template>

Description: Use useColorMode for light/dark theme switching
Do: Use Nuxt color mode integration

Description: Respect user's system color preference by default
Do: Allow system preference option
Don't: Force light or dark mode only
Code Bad:
// Only light/dark options
// No system preference

Description: Ensure all custom styles work in light and dark modes
Do: Use dark: variant for dark mode styles
Don't: Write styles only for light mode

Description: Use ui prop for granular style customization
Do: Pass ui object with class overrides
Don't: Use class prop for all customization
Code Good:
<UButton
  :ui="{
    base: 'font-bold tracking-wide',
    rounded: 'rounded-none',
    size: { lg: 'text-lg px-8 py-4' }
  }"
>
  Custom
</UButton>
Code Bad:
<UButton class="font-bold rounded-none px-8 py-4">
  <!-- May not override all styles -->
</UButton>

Description: Define reusable style presets for components
Do: Create preset configurations in composables
Code Bad:
<UButton :ui="{ rounded: 'rounded-full', size: { lg: 'px-8 py-4' }}">
<UButton :ui="{ rounded: 'rounded-full', size: { lg: 'px-8 py-4' }}">
// Repeated everywhere

Description: Use lazy prefix for components not needed immediately
Do: Use Lazy prefix for below-fold components
Code Bad:
<UModal v-model="showSettings">
  <!-- Loaded even if never opened -->
</UModal>

Description: Only import icons and components you use
Do: Configure specific icon collections

Description: Apply color variants that convey meaning accessibly
Do: Use success/error colors semantically
Code Good:
<UAlert color="red" title="Error">
<UAlert color="green" title="Success">
<UAlert color="yellow" title="Warning">
Code Bad:
<UAlert color="purple" title="Error">
  <!-- Color doesn't convey meaning -->
</UAlert>

Description: Ensure all form inputs have accessible labels
Do: Use UFormGroup label or aria-label
Code Bad:
<UInput v-model="email" placeholder="Email" />
<!-- Placeholder is not a label -->

Description: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
Do: Test tab order and focus states

Description: UContentDoc renders Nuxt Content documents with styling
Do: Use content components for documentation

Description: UChatMessage provides chat bubble styling for AI interfaces
Do: Use chat components for conversational UIs

Description: Handle streaming AI responses with proper loading states
Do: Use streaming prop for typewriter effect
